originalTitle: 1M FPS mini-DoTA/LoL for reinforcement learning. Dev day #8
title: Training First Models on the Mini-DOTA Environment and Debugging Reward Scaling
summary: Worked on integrating neural network training with the mini-DOTA environment, including hooking up the action space, fixing a segmentation fault, and implementing a delta-distance reward function. The first training run produced agents that learned to move to lane and fight, but identified issues with reward logging and asymmetric team behavior.
